name: Hot Crunchy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken well and pat dry.
2. Chop the pecans fine in a food processor (be careful not to over-process).
3. Combine the chopped pecans with the rest of the ingredients in a shallow bowl and mix well.
4. In another shallow bowl, melt 1 tablespoon butter.
5. Dredge each chicken piece first in the melted butter, then in the dry mixture. Coat well, shaking off any excess.
6. Bake in a shallow pan at 375°F for 30 minutes (longer if you like dried-out chicken).
7. Spread with a dab of Honey Pecan Butter: In a food processor, combine 4 tablespoons butter, 1/2 cup pecans, and 2 tablespoons honey. Process to blend.
Serves: 4 portions
This is also a very liberal adaptation of the original recipe, which was deep-fried. From the "New Basics Cookbook".
